# heeb

> AI SEO API allows developers to query and analyze multiple LLMs such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity with a single prompt. Get structured JSON responses containing mentions, citations, sentiment, and content gap insights — helping product, SEO, and research teams understand AI visibility and optimize for better representation across models.

Heeb.ai offers an API for AI SEO and related resources, including blog articles on AI tools, analytics, and optimization strategies.

## Homepage

- [heeb](https://heeb.ai): Heeb.ai offers an AI SEO API to track brand mentions, sentiment, and visibility across top LLMs like ChatGPT and Perplexity.

## Blog

- [Introducing heeb: The API for AI SEO and LLM Visibility Data | heeb](https://heeb.ai/blog/introducing-heeb-ai): heeb.ai is an API for AI SEO, providing structured visibility data from LLMs like ChatGPT and Perplexity.

- [AI and Data Analytics: Essential Insights | heeb](https://heeb.ai/blog/ai-and-data-analytics-essential-insights): AI revolutionizes data analytics through machine learning, predictive modeling, anomaly detection, and 2025 trends in efficiency and ethical regulations.

- [Top AI SEO Tools for Efficient Optimization | heeb](https://heeb.ai/blog/top-ai-seo-tools-for-efficient-optimization): Overview of leading AI SEO tools including Semrush, Surfer, and Search Atlas for content optimization, keyword research, and best practices.

- [Top AI Tools for Marketing Analytics | heeb](https://heeb.ai/blog/top-ai-tools-for-marketing-analytics): Discover top AI tools for marketing analytics, enabling predictive insights, real-time processing, and automation to boost ROI in 2025.
